title: zsh
description: zsh documents overview material for zsh in the system domain. It is classified as an entity page for the tool class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Install, Oh My Zsh, Font, Theme, and Plugins, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include oh-my-zsh, powerlevel10k, shell, and system, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is system / zsh / overview, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
